data.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "plan-review PASSED on attempt 8 (0 blocking; verifier dropped the code-blind library-symbol false-positives per bug succinct-formable-kite); attestation write was lost to a transient git index.lock (bug middle-actinium-thrush) and the deterministic re-run flapped BLOCK on 2 minor non-deterministic precision nits. User-approved force-claim.".
